creator: chris@ts1.netville.passage.net
text:
when I try to configure an ethernet device I and add a route for it, I try to ping it, and when I do it gets the error arpresolve: cant allocate llinfo for 207.98.254.150
any more information needed, email me at chris@netville.passage.net

How-To-Repeat: ping 207.98.524.152(the newly created ethernet device)
